Class PriceQuery

java.lang.Object
com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.query.PriceQuery
public class PriceQuery extends Object
Query for retrieving price information from the Tibber API.

This class provides methods to retrieve current and future electricity prices for a specific home.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PriceQuery(TibberApiClient client)
    Creates a new price query with the specified Tibber API client.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Price
    getCurrentPrice(String homeId)
    Retrieves the current electricity price for the specified home.
    List<Price>
    getTodayPrices(String homeId)
    Retrieves the electricity prices for today for the specified home.
    List<Price>
    getTomorrowPrices(String homeId)
    Retrieves the electricity prices for tomorrow for the specified home.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • PriceQuery

      public PriceQuery(TibberApiClient client)
      Creates a new price query with the specified Tibber API client.
      Parameters:
      client - the Tibber API client

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentPrice

      public Price getCurrentPrice(String homeId) throws IOException
      Retrieves the current electricity price for the specified home.
      Parameters:
      homeId - the ID of the home
      Returns:
      the current price information
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during the API request

    • getTodayPrices

      public List<Price> getTodayPrices(String homeId) throws IOException
      Retrieves the electricity prices for today for the specified home.
      Parameters:
      homeId - the ID of the home
      Returns:
      the list of prices for today
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during the API request

    • getTomorrowPrices

      public List<Price> getTomorrowPrices(String homeId) throws IOException
      Retrieves the electricity prices for tomorrow for the specified home.
      Parameters:
      homeId - the ID of the home
      Returns:
      the list of prices for tomorrow, or an empty list if not available
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during the API request
